positive: A whimsical, stylized silhouette of a celestial guardian: a graceful winged creature adorned with nebula dust and constellations, hovering over an ancient, glowing forest. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, designed for a striking apparel print. Use a deep cosmic background palette (indigo, violet, deep teal) contrasted with brilliant gold and bioluminescent emerald accents. The style should evoke Art Nouveau mixed with modern scientific illustration, emphasizing clean lines, sharp edges, and graphic strength. The subject must have clear separation from the background (strong silhouette effect) for maximum print appeal. Highly detailed, vector art quality, high contrast, dramatic spotlighting.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, lowres, noise, sepia, grainy, photographic
